top_signals.title: ECB’s Kazimir Says Rates Must Be Lifted More to Tackle Inflation
top_signals.summary: Inflation spreading through the economy will force the European Central Bank to raise interest rates further, according to Governing Council member Peter Kazimir.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: There's one simple way to tell whether bitcoin has really bottomed. Right now, it hasn't.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: BE ON THE BALL WITH OUR CHARITY FOOTBALL TOURNAMENT!
top_signals.summary: Eastern City is delighted to partner with the homelessness charity Providence Row to deliver the The Mile Between Us Cup 2026 – a five-a-side football tournament like no other! On 17th July, Providence Row and Eastern City BID will bring together businesses for an afternoon of football, friendly rivalry and fundraising in support of people [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
